title: Biel, Bern — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Biel, Bern: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Biel is a city in Bern with a population of 55,000. A bilingual German-French city at the foot of the Jura Mountains, known for its watchmaking industry, the Omega and Swatch headquarters, and the annual Biel Festival.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
